name: Oysters a La Grand Isle
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Campbell's cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each oyster into 5 pieces and drain the liquid.
2. Chop the onions finely.
3. Sauté the chopped onions in butter until they are clear.
4. Add the oysters to the sautéed onions and cook over low heat until firm, or until cooked to your preference.
5. Turn off the heat. Add the soup, keeping the skillet on the stove without any fire.
6. Mix everything together well until combined.
7. Serve on Trisket crackers.
